title: dogtag-pki and jss bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
dogtag-pki
[11.7.0-2]
- Rebase to PKI 11.7.0
- Resolves: RHEL-99832

jss
[5.7.0-2]
- Rebase to JSS 5.7.0
- Jira Ticket RHCS-98721 ACME server: RFC 8555 violation: Support ES256 #4638 [rhel-10]
- Jira Ticket IDM-2428 build encountered: PQC alg defs to match with NSS V3.112
full_text:
dogtag-pki
[11.7.0-2]
- Rebase to PKI 11.7.0
- Resolves: RHEL-99832

jss
[5.7.0-2]
- Rebase to JSS 5.7.0
- Jira Ticket RHCS-98721 ACME server: RFC 8555 violation: Support ES256 #4638 [rhel-10]
- Jira Ticket IDM-2428 build encountered: PQC alg defs to match with NSS V3.112

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20481-0.html
